prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-10IN1SURVIVALTOOL-GRN-2PK Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10 in 1 Compact Survival Kit Camping Hiking Gear Emergency Supplies 2pk Description: This 10 in 1 mini survival kit is compact, space saving and eliminates the need for multiple survival tools and emergency preparedness items when packing and prepping your gear.

With this survival kit, you’re getting: flint and steel striker, thermometer, hygrometer, 2.5X magnifier, emergency whistle, signaling mirror, 1.25 inch ruler, bubble level, liquid filled precision compass, mini LED flashlight and extractor key.

Compass: Navigate unfamiliar terrain with the liquid filled precision compass; cleverly designed, the compass is visible on the top of the survival kit hard case, making it quick to access.

Hygrometer: Measure the water vapor or humidity in your current environment.

Fire Starter: Flint and steel striker are small but effective in creating sparks to start a fire.

Emergency Whistle: Good for short to medium range distances.

LED Flashlight: Bright and easy to activate, the flashlight also illuminates the compass tip when turned on; batteries included.

A noteworthy design feature of the mini survival kit is the hinge storage bar. Here, you’ll find the flint and steel striker carefully tucked away, along with the emergency whistle, that are removed via the included extractor key, saving space and keeping these items secure and moisture free. And lastly, the mini survival kit also includes a built in nylon wrist strap, making it easy to attach to your person, a survival kit, bug out bag, hiking backpack and more.

With no space wasted and weighing in at just 0.05lbs, the survival kit is an easy and lightweight addition to any and all of your outdoor and survival gear and supplies. Search Terms: Prepper gear and supplies compass thermometer hygrometer car accessories hiking camping backpacking survival gear first aid kit emergency preparedness items fire starter bug out bag flint compass survival kits for disaster preparedness whistle Features: - 10 IN 1 SURVIVAL GEAR AND SUPPLIES: Compact survival kit includes flint and flint striker, thermometer, hygrometer, 2.5X magnifier, whistle, signaling mirror, 1.25 inch ruler, bubble level, liquid filled precision compass and mini LED flashlight - COMPASS: Visible on the outside of the hard case to save on interior space, the liquid filled precision compass dial measures 1.125 inches in diameter; a must have survival prepper supplies emergency preparedness item to navigate unfamiliar terrain; compass tip is illuminated when flashlight is on for better visibility in low light - FIRE STARTER: Small but mighty the steel striker and flint can be found at the back or top of the hard case at the hinge, along with the emergency whistle; easy to extract with included extractor pin, quickly create sparks to start a fire - THERMOMETER AND HYGROMETER: This compact survival kit also features both a thermometer and hygrometer on the exterior of the hard case; hygrometer calculates the amount of water vapor or humidity in the air of your current environment - NO SPACE WASTED: The compact design of this fire starter survival tool thoughtfully integrates all components so no space is wasted; weighing in at just 0.28lbs, the survival kit is an easy lightweight addition to any and all of your outdoor and survival gear or emergency supplies === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10 in 1 Compact Survival Kit 2-pk Green

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk Green 10-in-1 Compact Survival Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Compass, Thermometer, Hygrometer, Fire Starter, LED Flashlight, Emergency Whistle, Magnifier, Mirror, Ruler, Level

openai.title_differentiation: Flint And Steel Fire Starter, Liquid Filled Compass, Thermometer, Hygrometer, Whistle, LED Flashlight, Magnifier
